Username must be 3-16 characters!: Iti i eren tom a mi la ia lu a ikyav 3-16!
Password must contain at least one upper: Gba u password una lu a ikyav i vesen i môm!
● At least 1 Symbol: ● Ka i lu ikyav i môm tseegh .
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Password la gba u una lu a ikyav 8-16!
Passwords do not match!: Password mba eren kwagh môm ga!
● Passwords must match: ● Gba u akaa a i yer ér password la aa lu kwagh môm .
Not your preferred language?: Ka zwa u u hembe soon la ga he?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Gba u password una lu a ikyav i môm tseegh!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Gba u Iti i Or u nan lu eren tom a mi la ia lu hen atô u 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Gba u Password una lu hen atô u 8-16 .
Already have an account?: U ngu a akaa a eren kpa?
Password must contain at least one lower: Gba u password una lu a ikyav i kiriki i môm!
Don't have an account?: U ngu a akaa a eren ga?
● At least 1 Uppercase Letter: ● I nger washika u vesen môm .
Password must contain at least one numbe: Gba u password una lu a namba môm!
